name: PHB Races Starter
description: Starter race/subrace list — names + structural data + placeholders. Fill in `desc` from your own PHB or use the in-app editor's paste-and-parse.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.desc: Your base walking speed increases to 35 feet.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.desc: You can attempt to hide even when you are only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, and other natural phenomena.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.desc: Your darkvision has a radius of 120 feet.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.desc: You have disadvantage on attack rolls and on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight when you, the target of your attack, or whatever you are trying to perceive is in direct sunlight.

traits.name: Drow Magic
traits.desc: You know the dancing lights cantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can cast the faerie fire spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. When you reach 5th level, you can also cast the darkness spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Drow Weapon Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with rapiers, shortswords, and hand crossbows.

traits.name: Dwarven Armor Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

traits.name: Stout Resilience
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Natural Illusionist
traits.desc: You know the minor illusion cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Speak with Small Beasts
traits.desc: Through sounds and gestures, you can communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.
